tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.title: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: In alignment with MTA's strategic priorities, a biannual report to the Committee on the Railroads' progress in delivering safe and reliable transportation and excellent customer service.

Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2023.
The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2022 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

The Agency will present its revised 2024 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2023 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2023 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2023 Adopted Budget.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2023 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.
A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
In alignment with MTA's strategic priorities, a biannual report to the Committee on the Railroads' progress in delivering safe and reliable transportation and excellent customer service.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the fall of 2024.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2025 Budget.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2023 Budget.

tool_args.label: East Side Access Support Projects Update

payload.description: The Committee will be briefed on the status of the East Side Access Support Projects.

Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.
The committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads which went into effect in December 2020.
A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.
The agency will provide the 2024 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.

payload.claim_text: The LIRR Committee Work Plan includes recurring monthly reports on operations, financial performance, and ridership as part of Performance Summaries.
payload.description: A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators. A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast. A monthly report will be provided that compares actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues against prior year results.
